channel.title: Idris Kabangu Insights
channel.description: Long-form insights on business systems, strategy, finance, operations, and digital growth.

item.title: The Future of Work: AI-Augmented Decision Making
item.description: An evidence-based analysis of how AI is reshaping decisions, workflows, and operating design across business functions.

item.title: Digital Transformation in Financial Services
item.description: A structured analysis of how AI, embedded finance, APIs, and interoperability are reshaping banking and fintech.

item.title: Sustainable Business Models: Beyond ESG
item.description: Sustainability is no longer a branding layer added after strategy. The most resilient organizations are embedding sustainability into operating models, capital allocation, governance, and reporting discipline.

item.title: Operational Excellence in the Digital Age
item.description: Operational excellence in the digital age is no longer just about efficiency. It is about combining process discipline, data visibility, digital tools, and human decision-making to improve performance and create lasting competitive advantage.
